Entry.JapaneseText: もうちょっとだけ頼んでみようよ
Entry.EnglishText: We'd like to try to negotiate a bit.

Entry.JapaneseText: おまえ、そんなに俺のとこで働きてぇのか？
Entry.EnglishText: You guys wanna work for me that bad?

Entry.JapaneseText: じゃあ残飯の片付けとか 庭の害虫駆除とか 食い物調達係くらいならやらしてやるよ
Entry.EnglishText: Then you can do stuff like clean up food leftovers, get rid of pests in the garden, or be in charge of supplying the food.

Entry.JapaneseText: 勝手な事言うなよ、ルーク。 それを仕事にしてる 使用人だっているんだぞ
Entry.EnglishText: Don't say selfish things like that, Luke. You have servants employed for you for that stuff.

Entry.JapaneseText: 知るかよ！ 誰でも出来る仕事なんだから 適当にクビにしちまえ、そんなもん
Entry.EnglishText: Like I care! Anyone can do work like that. We can just fire those people.

Entry.JapaneseText: なにその言い方。 あなたの為に一生懸命働いてくれる人達に ちょっと失礼なんじゃない？
Entry.EnglishText: What's with that way of speaking? Isn't that a bit rude to say about the people who work their hardest for your sake?

Entry.JapaneseText: あぁ？ なに言ってんだ？ 使用人なんだから 俺の為に働くのは当たり前だろ
Entry.EnglishText: Huh? Heck are you talking about? They're servants. Obviously they work for my sake.

Entry.JapaneseText: ファラ、オレこいつの下で働きたくねぇよ
Entry.EnglishText: Farah, I do not wanna work for this guy.

Entry.JapaneseText: うん、わたしも嫌だな。 自分の為に働いてくれる人を ぞんざいに扱うなんて、最低だもん
Entry.EnglishText: Yeah, I don't like this one bit, either. Treating someone who works for you so rudely is the absolute worst.

Entry.JapaneseText: はは、ひどい言われようだな、ルーク
Entry.EnglishText: Haha. That WAS a pretty awful thing to say, Luke.
